emails.subject: Final draft/letter
emails.body: I did not see you on the distribution. Comments? Forwarded by David Parquet/SF/ECT on 07/05/2001 10:12 AM "Jan Smutny-Jones" <smutny@iepa.com> 06/28/2001 10:58 AM Please respond to smutny

emails.subject: Final draft/letter
emails.body: I did not see you on the distribution. Comments? Forwarded by David Parquet/SF/ECT on 07/05/2001 10:12 AM "Jan Smutny-Jones" <smutny@iepa.com> 06/28/2001 10:58 AM Please respond to smutny

emails.subject: Re: Final draft/letter
emails.body: Re: Final draft/letter Thanks. As you know, I'm in the negotiations. It's the best chance there is to 1) get a real market and 2) keep Edison out of bankruptcy. Whether California can execute on it is another story. But we're trying damned hard to make it happen. IEP should support it. Anything that you can do with Jan would be useful and appreciated. Best, Jeff David Parquet@ECT 07/05/2001 12:12 PM
